zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Willoughby IV於1343年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯時，他的父親John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby15歲，母親Lady Cecily de Ufford16歲。他於1381年10月9日之前與Margery Zouche結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年8月9日在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普享年53歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Willoughby IV于1343年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯时，他的父亲John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby15岁，母亲Lady Cecily de Ufford16岁。他于1381年10月9日之前与Margery Zouche结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年8月9日在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普享年53岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Willoughby IV was born in 1343, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby, was 15 and his mother, Lady Cecily de Ufford, was 16. He married Margery Zouche before 9 October 1381. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 August 1396, in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Willoughby IV est né en 1343, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecily de Ufford, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margery Zouche avant 9 octobre 1381. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 août 1396, à Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Willoughby IV 1343 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby 15 und seine Mutter Lady Cecily de Ufford 16. Er hat vor 9. Oktober 1381 Margery Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. August 1396 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Willoughby IV è nato il nel 1343 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lady Cecily de Ufford, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margery Zouche prima del 9 ottobre 1381. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 agosto 1396, nel Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Willoughby IVが1343年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父John Willoughby III Lord Willoughbyは15歳，母Lady Cecily de Uffordは16歳であった。1381年10月9日以前にMargery Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年8月9日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスソルペで53歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Willoughby IV(이)가 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Cecily de Ufford(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1381년 10월 9일 이전 Margery Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 8월 9일 영국 링코실르 그림스소에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스피스비에 묻혔다.

mn.Eresby, Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England: Lincoln, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Willoughby IV nasceu em 1343, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecily de Ufford, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Zouche antes 9 de outubro de 1381. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1396, em Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Willoughby IV родился в 1343 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecily de Ufford, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Zouche перед 9 октябрь 1381 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 августа 1396 г. в местности гримстаурп, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Willoughby IV nació en 1343, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lady Cecily de Ufford, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margery Zouche antes de 9 de octubre de 1381. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1396, en Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
